snippet.title: YABI - TIMI HO
snippet.description:
Written & performed by YABI THE G.O.A.T
Recorded at Kadak Nepali Records
Mixing & Mastering by Ruthlex
 
Get connected

YABI : https://www.instagram.com/yabi_the_g.o.a.t?igsh=MzE0anFmemF0bXV6&utm_source=qr

kADAK NEPALI RECORDS: https://www.instagram.com/kadaknepali?igsh=cDVoNW82NmIxbWY1

Ruthlex: https://www.instagram.com/ruthlexx_np?igsh=OHJ3djdvM3NmcHpz


тАЬTimi HoтАЭ  the 4th track from my mixtape Boomerang is finally here. This song is about real connection, loyalty, and the one person who becomes your strength when everything else feels uncertain. Sometimes in life, no matter how far things go, the right energy always comes back to you like a boomerang.
Thank you to everyone who keeps supporting the journey and believing in the music. This one is from the heart.

тАЬTimi HoтАЭ is now streaming on all platforms.

snippet.title: Bhooth Bangla -Official Teaser | Akshay Kumar, Tabu, Paresh, Wamiqa, Priyadarshan |In Cinemas 10 Apr
snippet.description:
Laughter, screams, and surprises are waiting inside the Bangla. Dare to enter? ЁЯдгЁЯзЯтАНтЩАя╕П
#BhoothBanglaTeaser out now!

#BhoothBangla in cinemas on 10th April 2026 ЁЯС╗

Bhooth Bangla reunites #AkshayKumar with acclaimed director #Priyadarshan after 14 years, promising a delightful blend of comedy, horror, and thrill.

Balaji Telefilms Ltd. in association with Cape Of Good Films present
Bhooth Bangla

Starring: Akshay Kumar, Paresh Rawal, Rajpal Yadav, Tabu, Wamiqa Gabbi, Jisshu Sengupta, Manoj Joshi, Mithila Palkar, Asrani Ji, Rajesh Sharma 
Directed by: Priyadarshan
Produced by: Akshay Kumar, Shobha Kapoor, Ektaa R. Kapoor
Co-producer: Vimal Doshi, Farahjaan Sheikh, Vedant Vikaas Baali
Group CEO & CFO (BTL): Sanjay Dwivedi
Director of Photography: Divakar Mani
Story by: Aakash Kaushik
Screenplay by: Priyadarshan, Rohan Shankar, Abilash Nair
Dialogues by: Rohan Shankar
Music: Pritam
Lyrics: Yitendra Mishra & Kumaar
Co-Director: Abilash Nair
Editor: Aiyappan Nair M.S
Line Producers: Suresh Balaji & George Pius
Costume Designers: V Sai Babu, Dhanya Balakrishnan, Veera Kapur, Rimple & Harpreet
Sound Designers: Rajakrishnan & Shahaab Alam
Background Score: Ronnie Raphael
DI: Sri Sarathi Studios
DI Colorist: Vishnuvardhan
VFX: WRC Studio LLP
VFX Supervisor: Sidharth Priyadarshan
Production Designer: Sabu Cyril
Director of Choreography: Pony Verma, Ganesh Acharya
Group Commercial Head (BTL): Hamavvand Chwda
Head of Marketing (BTL): Raveena S Deshpaande
Post Production Head (BTL): Manohar Pandya
VP Licensing and Syndication (BTL): Ankit Chauhan
Commercial Head (BTL): Mitesh Bilakhia
Executive Producer: Pooja Tiwari Angarish
Publicity Designer: House of Awe
Media Consultant: Spice
Digital Agency: Everymedia
Visual Promotions: Just Right Studioz NX

#ZeeMusicCompany #PenMovies

snippet.title: Dhurandhar The Revenge Official Hindi Trailer | Ranveer S | Aditya D | In Cinemas 19 March 2026
snippet.description:
Ab Pakistan ka mustakbil, Hindustan tay karega
Dhurandhar The Revenge Trailer Out Now.  Book Now for Paid Previews on 18th March only.

Releasing worldwide on 19 March, on Gudi Padwa, Ugadi, and Eid.

Jio Studios presents
A B62 Studios Production

An Aditya Dhar Film
DHURANDHAR THE REVENGE 

Written, Directed and Produced by Aditya Dhar
Produced by Jyoti Deshpande
Produced by Lokesh Dhar

Trailer Scored, Composed and Produced by Shashwat Sachdev

Ari Ari Song Credits: 
Composed, Arranged and Programmed by Shashwat Sachdev
Vocals: Navtej Singh Rehal (Bombay Rockers), Khan Saab, Jasmine Sandlas & Sudhir Yaduvanshi
Rap Performed and written by Reble, Token 
Lyrics by Irshad Kamil, Bombay Rockers
Score Producer Adam Lucas
Music Supervisor: Adarsh Vishwakarma

Director of Photography - Vikash Nowlakha
Editor: Shivkumar V. Panicker
Music and Background Score: Shashwat Sachdev
Casting Director: Mukesh Chhabra, CSA
Executive Producer: Rahul H. Gandhi
Character & Prosthetics Designer: Preetisheel Singh DтАЩSouza
Sound Designer: Bishwadeep Chatterjee
Costume Designer: Smriti Chauhan
Action Directors: Aejaz Gulab, Sea Young Oh, Yannick Ben, Ramazan Bulut
Choreographer: Vijay Ganguly
Additional Screenplay: Shivkumar V. Panicker, Ojas Gautam
Additional Production Designer: Rupin Suchak
Associate Director & Second Unit Director: Rohun Rege
Chief Assistant Director: Sameer Sadhwani
DirectorтАЩs Assistant: Ojas Gautam
Creative Producer: Aarsh Vora
Assistant Producer: Shweta Vora
Line Producer: Naseer Ahmed Khan
Research Consultant: Aditya Raj Kaul, Dibya S.
Associate Editor: Sumit Dhole, Juhi Gopalakrishnan
Marketing Manager: Chelsea Gupta
Production Sound Mixers: Manas Bal, Prabal Pradhan
Post Producer: Gautmik
Re-Recording Mixer: Justin Jose K (CAS)
VFX Supervisor: Dhruti Ranjan Sahoo
VFX Studios: Envision VFX, Philm CGI, Redefine, R2 VFX
DI Studio: Redefine
DI Colourist: Ashirwad Hadkar (ISC)
Digital Agency: White Rivers Media
PR Agency: Communique Film PR
Marketing Agency: MAX Marketing Ltd
Teaser and Trailer Editor: Ojas Gautam
Dubbing & Localization: Annapurna Studios
Visual Promotion: Jayesh Shikarkhane & Team
Publicity Design: Ma & Th (Marching Ants & Trigger Happy)

Jio Studios Team
COO & CFO: Priyanka Chaudhary
CEO Production and Distribution: Deepak Sharma
Chief Legal Officer: Dipti Kotak
PR Head: Amita Naidu

Dhurandhar The Revenge introduces Jaskirat Singh Rangi, tracing the chain of events that compel him to become Hamza Ali Mazari, and follows his rise as he operates deep inside Pakistan. The film is set to return this time in Hindi, Telugu, Tamil, Kannada and Malayalam.

19 March 2026
In Cinemas Worldwide
A Jio Studios Release

Dhurandhar The Revenge introduces Jaskirat Singh Rangi, tracing the chain of events that compel him to become Hamza Ali Mazari, and follows his rise as he operates deep inside Pakistan. The film is set to return this time in Hindi, Telugu, Tamil, Kannada and Malayalam.

snippet.title: Sanam Teri Kasam - 8K/4K Music Video | Harshvardhan Rane | Himesh Reshammiya | Ankit Tiwari, Palak M
snippet.description:
Relive the timeless romance with the stunning 8K/4K music video of "Sanam Teri Kasam" from the movie Sanam Teri Kasam. Featuring the heartfelt chemistry of Harshvardhan Rane and Mawra Hocane, this soulful track is beautifully composed by Himesh Reshammiya and sung by Ankit Tiwari and Palak Muchhal.

#sanamterikasam #8k #8kvideo #harshvardhanrane #mawrahocane #ankittiwari #palakmuchhal #himeshreshammiya 

Description:
Song - Sanam Teri Kasam
Singer - Ankit Tiwari, Palak Muchhal
Composer - Himesh Reshammiya
Lyricist - Himesh Reshammiya, Sameer Anjaan

Lyrics:
Betahasha dil ne
Tujhko hi chaaha hai
Har duaa mein maine
Tujhko hi maanga hai

Tera jaana jaise koi baddua
Tera jaana jaise koi baddua
Door jaaoge jo tum
Mar jaayenge hum
Sanam teri kasam o..
Sanam teri kasam o..
Sanam teri kasam..

Tumhe dekhte hi aankhen ho jaati namm
Sanam teri kasam o..
Sanam teri kasam o..
Sanam teri kasam..

Huaa ye kya hashar mera
Judaa huaa sabar mera
Main tere bin ek lamha
Kyun kabhi naa jiya

Raat bhar ashqo ne tujhko pukara hai
Har dua main maine tujhko hi maanga hai

Tera jaana jaise koi baddua
Door jaaoge jo tum
Mar jaayenge hum
Sanam teri kasam o..
Sanam teri kasam o..
Sanam teri kasam..

Tumhe dekhte hi aankhen ho jaati nam
Sanam teri kasam o..
Sanam teri kasam o..
Sanam teri kasam...

Nasha tera dil ko lagaa
Dena nahi mujhko dagaa
Main teri aadat ka maara
Hai kya meri khataa

Tere bin naamumkin
Apna guzaara hai
Har duaa mein maine
Tujhko hi maanga hai

Tera jaana jaise koi baddua
Door jaaoge jo tum
Mar jaayenge hum
Sanam teri kasam o..
Sanam teri kasam o..
Sanam teri kasam..

Tumhe dekhte hi aakhen ho jaati nam
Sanam teri kasam o..
Sanam teri kasam o..
Sanam teri kasam..

snippet.title: BTS (ы░йэГДьЖМыЕДыЛи) 'ьХДыжмыЮС (ARIRANG)' Animation Trailer: What is your love song?
snippet.description:
ы│╕ ь╜ШэЕРь╕аыКФ 1896ыЕД 5ьЫФ 8ьЭ╝ьЮР The Washington PostьЧР ьЛдыж░ эХЬъ╡н ь▓ныЕД 7ьЭ╕ьЭШ ьЭ┤ьХ╝ъ╕░(тАЬSeven Koreans at Howard")ьЩА, ьЭ┤ыУд ьдС ьЭ╝ы╢Аъ░А ъ░ЩьЭА эХ┤ 7ьЫФ 24ьЭ╝ ып╕ъ╡н ьЫМьЛ▒эД┤ D.C.ьЧРьДЬ эХЬъ╡н ь╡Ьь┤ИьЭШ ьЭМьЫРьЭД ыЕ╣ьЭМэХЬ ъ╕░ыбЭьЧРьДЬ ьШБъ░РьЭД ы░ЫьХД ъ╕░эЪНыРШьЧИьК╡ыЛИыЛд. эХЬъ╡ньЧРьДЬ ъ▒┤ыДИъ░Д ь▓ныЕДыУдьЭШ ьЛдьаЬ ыкйьЖМыжмъ░А ыЛ┤ъ╕┤ ьЧньВмьаБ ъ╕░ыбЭъ│╝ ь╡Ьь┤ИьЭШ ьХДыжмыЮС ыЕ╣ьЭМьЭ┤ыЭ╝ыКФ ым╕эЩФьаБ ьЭШып╕ые╝ ыкиэЛ░ы╕МыбЬ ьВ╝ьХД эШДыМАьаБ ьГБьГБыаеьЧР ъ╕░ы░ШэХШьЧм ьЮмъ╡мьД▒ ы░П ь░╜ьЮСыРЬ ъ▓ГьЬ╝ыбЬ, ьЛдьаЬьЩА ыЛдые╝ ьИШ ьЮИьЬ╝ый░ ьЧньВмьаБ ьВмъ▒┤ьЭ┤ыВШ ьЭ╕ым╝ьЧР ыМАэХЬ эПЙъ░А┬╖эХ┤ьДЭъ│╝ыКФ ым┤ъ┤АэХиьЭД ы░ЭэЮЩыЛИыЛд.

This video was inspired by the story of seven young Koreans as documented in The Washington Post on May 8, 1896 (тАЬSeven Koreans at HowardтАЭ), some of whom captured the first known audio recordings of Koreans in Washington, D.C., on July 24 of that same year. As a modern reimagining, this work draws upon the profound cultural significance of these historical records, which preserve the authentic voices of young Korean men and the first-ever recording of тАЬArirang.тАЭ This production may deviate from actual historical events and does not serve as a formal evaluation or interpretation of any historical event or person.

ы│╕ ь╜ШэЕРь╕аыКФ 1896ыЕД 5ьЫФ 8ьЭ╝ьЮР The Washington PostьЧР ьЛдыж░ эХЬъ╡н ь▓ныЕД 7ьЭ╕ьЭШ ьЭ┤ьХ╝ъ╕░(тАЬSeven Koreans at Howard")ьЩА, ьЭ┤ыУд ьдС ьЭ╝ы╢Аъ░А ъ░ЩьЭА эХ┤ 7ьЫФ 24ьЭ╝ ып╕ъ╡н ьЫМьЛ▒эД┤ D.C.ьЧРьДЬ эХЬъ╡н ь╡Ьь┤ИьЭШ ьЭМьЫРьЭД ыЕ╣ьЭМэХЬ ъ╕░ыбЭьЧРьДЬ ьШБъ░РьЭД ы░ЫьХД ъ╕░эЪНыРШьЧИьК╡ыЛИыЛд. эХЬъ╡ньЧРьДЬ ъ▒┤ыДИъ░Д ь▓ныЕДыУдьЭШ ьЛдьаЬ ыкйьЖМыжмъ░А ыЛ┤ъ╕┤ ьЧньВмьаБ ъ╕░ыбЭъ│╝ ь╡Ьь┤ИьЭШ ьХДыжмыЮС ыЕ╣ьЭМьЭ┤ыЭ╝ыКФ ым╕эЩФьаБ ьЭШып╕ые╝ ыкиэЛ░ы╕МыбЬ ьВ╝ьХД эШДыМАьаБ ьГБьГБыаеьЧР ъ╕░ы░ШэХШьЧм ьЮмъ╡мьД▒ ы░П ь░╜ьЮСыРЬ ъ▓ГьЬ╝ыбЬ, ьЛдьаЬьЩА ыЛдые╝ ьИШ ьЮИьЬ╝ый░ ьЧньВмьаБ ьВмъ▒┤ьЭ┤ыВШ ьЭ╕ым╝ьЧР ыМАэХЬ эПЙъ░А┬╖эХ┤ьДЭъ│╝ыКФ ым┤ъ┤АэХиьЭД ы░ЭэЮЩыЛИыЛд.

This video was inspired by the story of seven young Koreans as documented in The Washington Post on May 8, 1896 (тАЬSeven Koreans at HowardтАЭ), some of whom captured the first known audio recordings of Koreans in Washington, D.C., on July 24 of that same year. As a modern reimagining, this work draws upon the profound cultural significance of these historical records, which preserve the authentic voices of young Korean men and the first-ever recording of тАЬArirang.тАЭ This production may deviate from actual historical events and does not serve as a formal evaluation or interpretation of any historical event or person.

Art Director: L├йa Pinto

Background Designer: L├йa Pinto, Judit Boor

Modeler: Helen Kim, Seong Daseul, Jiwon Shin, Gahyun Lee, Youjin Lim, Daeun Jeong, Jieon Kim,
Rigging Artist: Dohyun Yeo

Lighting Artist: Helen Kim, Seong Daseul, Jiwon Shin, Gahyun Lee

2D Animation Supervisor: Cho Hea Seung, SeokWoo Kim
2D Animator: Kim Jiyul, Woo Ji Yeon, Choi Ji Hyun, Choi Yu Mi, Park Yun Seo, Yang Eun Ji, Jeong Yunbi, Lee Min Ji, Jun Hye Jin, Dabin Jung, So-dam Jeong, Ryoun-Ki Hong, Jin-young Go
2D Animation Timer: Park Dae Yeol, Jo Ahra
2D Effects Artist: Ina Choi

'Arirang' Composer & Piano: Goldbranch
Sound Designer: Jang Mi Ra

snippet.title: Bairan тАУ Animated Love Story | Banjaare (Official Video)
snippet.description:
Bairan was never meant to be a hit.

We made Bairan for hearts, not for trends, not for reels, not for charts

No label. No big budget. Just two Brothers and a feeling.

We shot a real music video in Chandigarh.
We trusted the wrong person.
And received cheap quality.
That video almost destroyed this song.
So we cancelled everything.
We uploaded only the audio through DistroKid, with no marketing, no plans.
Then something magical happened.
YouTube algorithm picked Bairan.
People started listening.
People started feeling it.
People made it viral.
And suddenly, Bairan was no longer OUR song.
It became YOUR song.
ThatтАЩs why we decided to create this animated music video.
Because when characters are animated, everyone can see themselves in the story.
Every broken heart becomes the hero.
Every lover becomes the character.

This video is dedicated to every person who felt Bairan.
This is your story.
This is your song.


Song Credits: 
Title: Bairan
Singer/Lyricist/Composer: BANJAARE
Music: Roni
Mix-Master: Gurie
Animation : Ham_mah.10

Special Thanks To - Jayant Kamboj , Rajkumari

localized.description:
Bairan was never meant to be a hit.

We made Bairan for hearts, not for trends, not for reels, not for charts

No label. No big budget. Just two Brothers and a feeling.

We shot a real music video in Chandigarh.
We trusted the wrong person.
And received cheap quality.
That video almost destroyed this song.
So we cancelled everything.
We uploaded only the audio through DistroKid, with no marketing, no plans.
Then something magical happened.
YouTube algorithm picked Bairan.
People started listening.
People started feeling it.
People made it viral.
And suddenly, Bairan was no longer OUR song.
It became YOUR song.
ThatтАЩs why we decided to create this animated music video.
Because when characters are animated, everyone can see themselves in the story.
Every broken heart becomes the hero.
Every lover becomes the character.

This video is dedicated to every person who felt Bairan.
This is your story.
This is your song.

snippet.title: Bhooth Bangla Teaser REVIEW | Deeksha Sharma
snippet.description:
Bhooth Bangla Teaser Review By Deeksha Sharma. Akshay Kumar with Director Priyadarshan is set for Bhooth Bangla Franchise with Tabu & Wamiqa Gabbi in Mysterious Roles of Horror Comedy & Suspense- Bhooth Bangla Teaser is pure Nostalgia of Bhool Bhulaiyaa but falls short in editing & establishing connection of Old Characters in new story. Bhooth Bangla Teaser Trailer Reaction & Full Movie Expectation would be shared in this Video. Can Akshay Kumar challenge Kartik Aaryan for OG Horror Comedy Franchise? Do leave Comments below now!

snippet.title: Ganga Ke Kinare | Bunny | Sagar | Kripa Record
snippet.description:
Kripa Record Presents "Ganga Ke Kinare"

Singer - Bunny & Sagar
Music & Compose - Bunny 
Lyrics - Sagar 
Flute - Kiran Vinkar
Mix & Master - Hanish Taneja

Featuring - Dimpy Negi
Director - Alex
Creative Director & DOP - Arshad
Editor - Zipsi
Colourist - Onkar
VFX - Ronak Bindra and Aman Singh bhakuni 
BTS - Shubham rana 
Camera Assitant - Golu
Sagar & Bunny Makeup & Hair - Viren 
Dimpy makeup & Hair - Sonakshi & Isha 
Choreographer - Chinu
Foreigners Coordinator - Chinu & Vijay Rawat
Dimpy Costume - Nandini Fashion ( Lehnga )
Camera & Light- Y-Series Production Lights 
Gaffer - Sunil 
Drone - Shanky 

Special thanks - Parmarth Niketan Ashram

Team Kripa Record - Ankita

Digital Distribution - Universal Music
Project Head - Sahil Sharma 

Lyrics: 

Chaand ko niharu
Shiv Jo pukaru x2
Ganga ke kinaare baith ke 
Baith keтАж
Ganga ke kinaare 
baith ke 

Rooh ko sawaru 
Aarti utaaru
Ganga ke kinaare baith ke x2
Baith keтАж. 

Hum toh hmare hi jeevan se hai itne 
Sataaye hue 
Toote hain bikhre hain hum toh 
Sabke bhulaye hue 

Kehte hain aaye jo 
Ganga nahaye 
Har jaate hain sab log 
Ab humne samjha hai 
Ab humne jana 
Kyu ganga aate hain log 

Thakk gaye the hum 
Dukhon ko utha ke 
Ab chain ayaaa 
Aayi ab saansain
Ganga ke kinaare baith ke 
Baith ke тАж. X2 

Kyu roye har baat me bandeya 
Kya laya tha sath me bandeya 
Jaane de jo chala gaya hai 
Kuch bi nai tere hath me bandeya  

Man nahi bharta 
Jitna bi taakain
Itna sukoon hain 
Bhar gayi aankhain
Ganga ke kinaare bath keтАж
 
Ganga dharaye shivaye Ganga dharaye 
Har har bole namah shivaye..

Reach us at: Kriparecordsindia@gmail.com

(c) Universal Music Group

тЦ║ About Kripa Record:

"Kripa Record" is a devotional music label dedicated to producing and promoting spiritual music that inspires profound experiences. "Kripa" meaning "grace" in Sanskrit, reflects the essence of divine mercy in the label's music. KripaтАЩs diverse devotional music is crafted by renowned artists, invoking peace, reverence, and spiritual awakening. It will serve as a cherished companion for meditation, prayer, and reflection.

baith ke

snippet.title: Lauv - I Like Me Better
snippet.description:
Lauv - I Like Me Better

(Lyrics)
[Verse 1]
To be young and in love in New York City
To not know who I am but still know that I'm good long as you're here with me
To be drunk and in love in New York City
Midnight into morning coffee
Burnin' through the hours talkin' (Damn)

[Chorus]
I like me better when I'm with you
I like me better when I'm with you
I knew from the first time
I'd stay for a long time 'cause
I like me better when
I like me better when I'm with you

[Drop]

[Verse 2]
I don't know what it is, but I got that feelin'
Wakin' up in this bed next to you, swear the room, yeah, it got no ceilin'
If we lay, let the day just pass us by
I might get to too much talkin'
I might have to tell you somethin' (Damn)

[Chorus]
I like me better when I'm with you
I like me better when I'm with you
I knew from the first time
I'd stay for a long time 'cause
I like me better when
I like me better when I'm with you

[Drop]

[Bridge]
Stay awhile, stay awhile, stay here with me
Stay awhile, stay awhile, oh
Stay awhile, stay awhile, stay here with me
Lay here with me, ayy, ayy, ooh

[Chorus]
I like me better when I'm with you (Yes, I do, yes, I do, baby)
I like me better when I'm with you (Oh no)
I knew from the first time
I'd stay for a long time 'cause
I like me better when
I like me better when I'm with you

[Outro]
(I like me, I like me)
(Look who you made me, made me, oh no)
Better when
I like me better when I'm with you

Tags:
I Like Me Better Lyrics
Lauv I Like Me Better
I Like Me Better Lauv
Stay awhile stay awhile stay here with me
Lay here with me ayy ayy ooh
I like me better when I'm with you
I like me better
When I'm with you
I knew from the first time
I'd stay for a long time 'cause
I like me better when
I like me better when I am with you
I Like Me Better

#Lauv #ILikeMeBetter #Lyrics

snippet.title: [Hindi] BGIS 2026 | SEMI FINALS | Day 3 #BGMILIVE #BGIS
snippet.description:
The SEMI FINALS of BGIS 2026 begin.

The competition tightens. The stakes rise. There is no margin for error now.

After battling through The Grind, Round stages, Quarter Finals and Wildcard, only the strongest remain. Every match carries weight. Every fight moves teams one step closer to the Grand Finals.

This is where contenders turn into finalists.

Watch the SEMI FINALS live and witness who takes the next step toward the championship stage.

snippet.title: Minecraft Speedrunner VS 6 Hunters
snippet.description:
Minecraft Speedrunner VS 6 Hunters. You asked for it. The continuation of the series. This was absolutely insane.

Follow my socials:
тЮ╜ Twitter - @dream
тЮ╜ Instagram - @dreamwastaken
тЮ╜ Snapchat - @dreampublic

Merch: https://dream.shop

BadBoyHalo: @thesaintsofgames 
George: @GeorgeNotFound 
Sapnap: @Sapnap 
Antfrost: @Antfrost 
awesamdude: @awesamdude 
CaptainPuffy: @CaptainPuffy 

We decided to call this series Minecraft Manhunt. This video is a different rendition of it, where there are SIX hunters instead of THREE hunters or just one.

This is a new Minecraft but, 1.21.11 challenge that we have decided to try. I try to beat the game, while my friend George AND my friend Sapnap AND my friend BadBoyHalo AND my friend Antfrost AND my friend awesamdude AND my friend CaptainPuffy tries to prevent me from doing it. It's a race, and it's super intense and we had a lot of laughs. I love doing these challenges.

If this video gets 500,000 likes we'll do a rematch!

Not Minecraft, But Water Rises or Minecraft, But Lava Rises, or any other but challenge like that. This is a speed run / speed runner of Minecraft against a killer / assassin

#MinecraftManhunt

localized.description:

snippet.description:
Final stop. Final energy. Final chapter of a journey weтАЩll never forget.
ClassX Rush Live Final EP

Vek тЬЦя╕П Swar тАФ two voices, one stage, one powerful moment.
This is not just a live session, this is the closing of a story built with passion, pressure, practice, and pure love for music.

From the first beat to the last note, this final episode carries everything we believe in  raw performance, real emotion, and real connection with the crowd.
No filters. No shortcuts. Just music, movement, and memories made on stage.

Thank you to everyone who supported the journey, watched every episode, shared the clips, and believed in what we are building.
This one is for the culture.
This one is for the grind.
This one is for the people who never stopped listening.

PROD mix master : Pozod
KEYS : santosh tamang
Written & Composed : Swapnil Sharma
Shot by : ZAY & Acies ( Aurora production )

snippet.title: TIMRO LOOKS - Rinmorin ft. KBABI (Official Music Video) Prod. itsriken
snippet.description:
TIMRO LOOKS - Rinmorin ft. KBABI (Official Music Video) Prod. Itsriken 
тОптОптОптОптОптОптОптОптОптОптОптОптОптОптОптОптОптОптОп
тАЬTIMRO LOOKSтАЭ is a rap song with a flirty mood, talking about that one girl whose looks and vibe keep running through my mindтЩк

Official Audio - https://youtu.be/hMIDW5HUY08?si=OMalmwP6kpg-L5n5

lyrics...

HOOK *
TIMRO LOOKS ATII BANGER
MERO HOOK TIMI SAMPLE 
TIMRO LOOKS ATII BANGER 
ATOM BOOM VANDA DANGER 
                     X2

Rinmorin - Verse 
HEJO SAAMA MALAI BAAL THYNA 
KASAI KO YHA JABA TIMLAI DEKHY MERO 
MUKH BATA DAMM GRIL 

LUKI LUKI HERNY BANI LAGYO TIMI LAI 
MA NAJIKINA KHOJE TARA KADA UMRYO JHYAN VAARRR

HALKA GARIDAUNA BATH 
ABO CHAIYO TIMRO SAATH DIYE 
CHODINA YO HAAT JHUTO  BOLE 
VANY MARI JAAUU

MUTU VETRA JAMMA 4 WOTA THAU 
HUNXA 
2 THAUMA TIMI RA MAH  2 THAUMA 
AAMA BAAU

RAKHI SAKE TIMLAI AARU VANDA MATHI 
AAKHA LAUNY TORI HARKO HAAT KHUTAA
VAACHDINXU MAAA

AARU VANDA NIKAI FARK XU MAH BAAL SANGAI  BUDHI ANI BAAG JASTI AATI XU MAAH 
TIMI 
XAUMA HUDA KAILY AATIN XA MAANN
JHUTO BOLYA HOINA  NASALU CHJJJ KHADINA MA
JALMA
 PARISAKE KEBAL HAAT DINUU LAAAA
ABO BAKI KURA PANDIT LAI RAKHDINXU MA TIMRO 

 LACHKINY KAAMR KO 36 KO number 
NA LAJAUNA VANNA LAI BADDHAI CHA 
HUNGER MA JAPDAI  XU MANTAR YHA DHERI XA ANTAR 
TIMRO JAWANI DEKHE RA LAAGDAI CHA 
CHAKKR

MA MAYA KO ROGI 
TIMI BANDAUNA 
DOCTOR AHH
 MAYA KO LAGI KATI 
KHADAI CHU THAKKR

HALKA BADY KO JEEUDAL 
MAH  MAKHHA TIMI SIMPLE NAI 
RAMRI NA PARANA NAKAL 

HOOK *
TIMRO LOOKS ATII BANGER
MERO HOOK TIMI SAMPLE 
TIMRO LOOKS ATII BANGER 
ATOM BOOM VANDA DANGER
                  X2

KBABI - verse 
NAHANA KTA GUFF MATHI GUFF 
DHERAI AATE GAYE TIMI JASTO CHAKS
RAYAAK LAGI RACHA PACHI PACHI
NAPARANA HASSssтАж..

Rinmorin - YOU KNOW WHAT I MEAN !!!

FASDINA MAH JHAL MAH
NAGARANA AASH 
JAY HO TYI VANDINXU MALAI LAGDAINA K LAAJ
MALAI MAAN PARDAINA BOKA HARU 
VANU PARDA KHASS
SAMALYRA RAKHA TIMRO JAWANI KO MAAT

K VAKO KTA HARU KT DEKHI MARNY
JHYAP CHA SIDE MAH CHICKS KO PAXI PARNY KT DEKHNAI HUNNA 
MASKY RA KURA GARNY 
K BOLIDI HALYO VANY FERI
MASKI NAJIK SARNY 

GARO GARO VAKO HOLA 
JAWANI DEKHYRA
CHITTA BUJAU ABO KTA 
TADHAI BATA HERYRA
TIMI JASTO GAFADI YHA KTA HARU
DHERAI CHA THMANAI NASAKNY TESTO KURA MA MAH K RAICHA 

Rinmorin - OH shit !!

KBABI - MAYA KO ROGI VAYE JAAU GARAU CHECK UP 
TIMRO POCKET MONEY LAY AAUDAINA MERO MAKE-UP
SOCHDAI SOCHDINA MA MERO MIND PURAI SETUP 
KBABI TESTO KTA GARDAINA NI DESERVE 

PATAUNA KHOJYA HOLA
PATINY MAH CHAINA
GUFADI KO TRUST UMMM HMM
TESTO KT HOINA
KTA HARKO BANI SABI YESTI TA HO NI 
AAFNO KAAM GARA PACHI NALAGANA
SORRY BROтАж.

HOOK *
TIMRO LOOKS ATII BANGER
MERO HOOK TIMI SAMPLE 
TIMRO LOOKS ATII BANGER 
ATOM BOOM VANDA DANGER  
                  X2

Kaagaz ke phool laau tere liye
Khat likhu tere liye
Mai khuda me maanu nahi
Par maangu dua tere liye

Tere liye ghar banaau
Deewaarein neele rang se sajaau
Pasand hai tumhe, maloom hai
Tumne bataya tha ekтБЯdafe

NeeleтБЯphoolтБЯlaau tere liye
KhatтБЯlikhu tere liye
MaiтБЯkhuda me maanu nahi
Par maangu dua tere liye

Teri baatein nasamajh si phir bhi jaayaz lag rahi hai
Tu pareshan kar rahi hai phir bhi masoom lag rahi hai
Tere liye mandir jaaun
Tere naam ka dia jalaaun
Hasta rahe tu chaahe jo ho
T╨╡ri hasi ko nazar na lage

Kaagaz ke phool laau ter╨╡ liye
Khat likhu tere liye
Mai khuda me maanu nahi
Par maangu dua tere liyeтАж

Tere liye hum bane hai
Tere liye badal rahe hai

Teri hi teri baatein kare

Pasand hai tumhe, maloom hai
Tumne bataya tha ek dafe

Nagma likha tere liye
Mai khuda me maanu kyun
Tu khuda mere liye

snippet.title: sun saawariya | Official Visualiser | Accha Insaan, AtharvaMusic, Yaani Karnawat
snippet.description:
Official lyric video for sun saawariya. 

Stream here: https://open.spotify.com/track/0dnsJ8W8k4ncYstIsrz5pY?si=9940b3d16b3b4538

Follow the artists:
Accha Insaan - https://www.instagram.com/accha_insaan/
AtharvaMusic - https://www.instagram.com/atharvamusic/
Yaani Karnawat - https://www.instagram.com/_yaani_16/

Lyrics:
Sun, sun re piya
Ghum hai kahan, kahan tu?
Khaarijh ye dil
Tune kiya, kiya kyu?
Khabar nahi teri na aasraa
Guroor hai tera ya hai khataa meri
Mujhe bata de zara

Mere falak ke noor nazaare bhi
Tere kadmon ke dhool se parey nahi
Mohlat iss ishq ka kar de fanaa
Sun saawariya

Sun saawariya kahan tu?
Teri reet main samajh na paau
Teri preet ka charkha liye bas
Ghoom ghoom ghoomta hi rahu

(Hmm)
(Aaa)

Taare, sitaare saare
Maange hai tera pataa
Aur aadhe, adhoore vaade
Leke chal diye ho kahan?

Mere falak ke noor nazaare bhi
Tere kadmon ke dhool se parey nahi
Mohlat iss ishq ka kar de fanaa
(Hmm)

Sun saawariya kahan tu?
Teri reet main samajh na paau
Teri preet ka charkha liye bas
Ghoom ghoom ghoom

Sun saawariya
Sun saawariya kahan tu?
Teri reet main samajh na paau
Teri preet ka charkha liye bas
Ghoom ghoom ghoomta hi rahu

snippet.title: Uniq Poet - Overdue ft. MC Flo
snippet.description:
Artists: Uniq Poet ft. MC Flo
Written by: Uniq Poet & MC Flo
Produced by: Mr. Yoshi (MPC Live 2 & Suno)
Co-Produced, Mixed & Mastered by: Kpass

About the Track
"Overdue" is a collaboration between Uniq Poet and MC Flo, blending lyricism with a soulful, melodic foundation. Produced on the MPC Live 2 with vocal enhancements via Suno, the track represents Uniq Poet and MC FloтАЩs mindset as they traverse through a life where music is a constant battle between internal pressure and external expectation. It serves as a candid reflection on the feeling of having fallen short for the listeners, capturing the moment an artist faces their own perceived delays. MC Flo, a long-standing inspiration and peer on this shared path, enters with a verse that serves as a catalyst, injecting the "can-do" mentality needed to break the silence and pull the narrative back into the light.

тАЬEvery line I write is a dedication long overdue!тАЭ

snippet.title: Zaalima - Arijit Singh | Shah Rukh Khan | Raees | Harshdeep Kaur | ValentineтАЩs Special Love Song
snippet.description:
ЁЯСЙЁЯП╗ SUBSCRIBE to Bollywood Chartbusters - https://bit.ly/3Y1MW0B

Song - Zaalima
Music - JAM8
Lyrics - Amitabh Bhattacharya
Singers - Arijit Singh and Harshdeep Kaur
Choreography - Bosco- Caesar

Written by - Rahul Dholakia, Harit Mehta, Ashish Vashi & Niraj Shukla
Director Of Photography - K.U Mohanan ISC
Produced By - Ritesh Sidhwani, Gauri Khan & Farhan Akhtar
Directed By - Rahul Dholakia

Sound Design:- Dj Phukan, Sunny M.R.
Programmers:- Sourav Roy, Dj Phukan, Sunny M.R., Rohan Chauhan, Arijit Singh
Mix & Master:- Shadab Rayeen @ Newedge
Assistant:- Abhishek Sortey
Shoot Mix:- Ashwin Kulkarni
Recording Engineers:- Ashwin Kulkarni, Himanshu Shirlekar, Aaroh Velankar, Kaushik Das
Vocal Conductor:- Akashdeep Sengupta, Kaushik Das, Tushar Joshi

Musicians:-
Drums:- Alan Hertz
Bass:- Ernest Tibbs
Duff:- Iqbal Azad
Harmonium:- Feroz Shaikh
Acoustic Guitars:- Pawan Rasaily and Arijit Singh
Electric Guitars:- Pawan Rasaily 

Lyrics:
Jo Teri Khatir Tadpe Pehle Se Hi
Kya Usey Tadpana O Zaalima, O Zaalima
Jo Tere Ishq Mein Behka Pehle Se Hi
Kya Usey Behkana O Zaalima, O Zaalima

Aankhen Marhaba, Baatein Marhaba
Main Sau Martaba Deewana Huaa
Mera Na Raha Jab Se Dil Mera
Tere Husn Ka Nishana Hua

Jiski Har Dhadkan Tu Ho
Aise Dil Ko Kya Dhadkana
O Zaalima, O Zaalima

Saanson Mein Teri Nazdeeqiyon Ka
Itrr Tu Ghol De, Ghol DeтАж
Main Hi Kyun Ishq Zaahir Karun
Tu Bhi Kabhi Bol De, Bol DeтАж

Leke Jaan Hi Jaayega Meri
Qaatil Har Tera Bahaana Hua
Tujhse Hi Shuru
Tujhpe Hi Khatam
Mere Pyaar Ka Fasaana Hua

Tu Shamma Hai Toh Yaad Rakhna
Main Bhi Hoon Parwaana
O Zaalima, O Zaalima..

Deedaar Tera Milne Ke Baad Hi
Chhoote Meri Angdaayi
Tu Hi Bata De Kyun Zaalima Main Kehlayi..

#RaeesSongs #ShahRukhKhanSongs #ArijitSinghSongs #valentinesday #romanticsong #zaalima


Music on Zee Music Company

Connect with us on :
Snapchat - https://bit.ly/3UIfICJ 
Twitter - https://www.twitter.com/ZeeMusicCompany
Facebook - https://www.facebook.com/zeemusiccompany
Instagram - https://www.instagram.com/zeemusiccompany
YouTube - http://bit.ly/TYZMC

Apa itu Roblox? ROBLOX adalah taman bermain dan bengkel virtual online, tempat anak-anak dari segala usia dapat berinteraksi, berkreasi, bersenang-senang, dan belajar dengan aman. ROBLOX unik karena hampir semua hal di dalamnya dirancang dan dibangun oleh anggota komunitas. ROBLOX dirancang untuk usia 13 hingga 18 tahun, tetapi terbuka untuk semua usia. Setiap pemain memulai dengan memilih avatar dan memberinya identitas. Mereka kemudian dapat menjelajahi ROBLOX тАФ berinteraksi dengan orang lain melalui obrolan, bermain game, atau berkolaborasi dalam proyek kreatif. Setiap pemain juga diberikan sebidang lahan virtual yang belum dikembangkan beserta kotak peralatan virtual untuk mendesain dan membangun apa pun тАФ baik itu gedung pencakar langit yang dapat dijelajahi, helikopter yang berfungsi, mesin pinball raksasa, game "Capture the Flag" multipemain, atau kreasi lain yang belum terbayangkan. Tidak ada biaya untuk lahan virtual pertama ini. Dengan berpartisipasi dan membangun hal-hal keren, anggota ROBLOX dapat memperoleh lencana khusus serta mata uang ROBLOX ("Robux"). Sebagai gantinya, mereka dapat berbelanja di katalog online untuk membeli pakaian dan aksesori avatar serta bahan bangunan premium, komponen interaktif, dan mekanisme yang berfungsi.

ROBLOX jest przeznaczony dla os├│b w wieku od 13 do 18 lat, ale jest otwarty dla os├│b w ka┼╝dym wieku. Ka┼╝dy gracz zaczyna od wyboru awatara i nadania mu to┼╝samo┼Ыci. Nast─Щpnie mo┼╝e odkrywa─З ROBLOX тАФ wchodz─Еc w interakcje z innymi poprzez czatowanie, granie w gry lub wsp├│┼Вprac─Щ przy kreatywnych projektach. Ka┼╝dy gracz otrzymuje r├│wnie┼╝ w┼Вasny kawa┼Вek niezagospodarowanej nieruchomo┼Ыci wraz z wirtualnym zestawem narz─Щdzi, za pomoc─Е kt├│rego mo┼╝e projektowa─З i budowa─З cokolwiek тАФ czy to nawigowalny wie┼╝owiec, dzia┼Вaj─Еcy helikopter, gigantyczny flipper, gr─Щ wieloosobow─Е тАЮCapture the FlagтАЭ czy inne, jeszcze niewyobra┼╝alne dzie┼Вo. Ta pierwsza wirtualna dzia┼Вka jest darmowa. Uczestnicz─Еc w zabawie i buduj─Еc fajne rzeczy, cz┼Вonkowie ROBLOX mog─Е zdobywa─З specjalne odznaki, a tak┼╝e dolary ROBLOX (тАЮRobuxтАЭ). Z kolei u┼╝ytkownicy mog─Е przegl─Еda─З katalog online, aby kupi─З ubrania i akcesoria awatara, a tak┼╝e wysokiej jako┼Ыci materia┼Вy budowlane, interaktywne komponenty i mechanizmy robocze.

#Roblox #foltyn

Aaya Sher

Composed by Anirudh Ravichander

Mastered by Mastered by Rupendar Venkatesh at Mix Magic
Music Coordinator - Velavan B

Cast: Natural Star Nani, Sonali Kulkarni & Others.
Technical Crew:

Banner: Slv Cinemas
Music Director: Anirudh
Dop: Ch Sai
Editor: Navin Nooli
Production Designer: Avinash Kolla

Co-Director: Hari K Chanduri
Writers: Thota Srinivas, Madhava Murthy Bojanapu, Arjuna Paturi, Vamshi Krishna Pinnika, Vasanth Masadi, Manupati Karunakar (Karna)
Dialect & Diction: Krishna Teja 
Costume Designer: Ajay Kumar J
Sound Designer: Suren G
Publicity Designer: Kabilan Chelliah
Vfx Supervisor: Naresh Yalla
Titles: Hari Krishna Y
Direction Team: Gajjala Bhaskar Reddy , Nagaraju Bramhaiha , Yashwanth Vittapu ,Madhu Sugreevu, Billakurthi, Venkata Aarush , Bhaskar Ponaboina , Uday Swaroop Kalahasti , Sai Kiran Modem , Hosakota Vamshi Krishna , Jasti Guhan Chowdary , Chaitthu Mothkuri .

Sr. Colorist: Ken Metzker
Stills: Sridhar Chadalawada
Pro: Vamsi-Sekhar
Marketing: First Show
Co Producer : Gopi Chand Innamuri  
Ceo : Vijay Kumar Chaganti 
Executive Producer: Abinav Waddypally
Production Controller: Jetty Vinay
Production Team: Kalyan Kumar Sagiraju, Brahmam Chigurupati, 
Raghu Dronavalli , Vallibaba Akula,  Juvvaala Kartheek (Tinku) , Vinay Kollu
2nd Unit Cinematographer - Praveen Pothan
Operative Cinematographer - Ram Kumar.R
Associate Cinematographer - Dwarakesh.S, Aboorvan.A
Assistant Cinematographer - Melvin
Brand Agency Partner - MMM Media Works 

Lyrics:
PALLAVI
Hey nee ayya jagiraa
Chal maavaadochindra
Iga jadthiyyaley | Jumbalikay aaya sher |

Hey aa daar kaa sulthaane
Maa ghar kaa saithaane
Chal shikaar jeyya | Jumbalikay aaya sher |

Pacha bottu gaayamidhi | Aaya sher |
Gunjukuney nyayamidhi | Aaya sher |
Boodidhala gadda idhi | Aaya sher |
Maatho raayabadda kadhe idhi | Aaya sher |

Jadaluro jadaluro hadaluro dhadaluro
Kodutharo thodaluro theestharo tholuro
Savaariki doruku biddaa
Sevaaley lesthayi biddaa

Pegul dheesi medala yesi
Aadutham biddaa, aadutham biddaa

CHARANAM

Aada eeda yeda joodu biddaa
Vanukay puttalinka paditheynay naa needa
Bondha pedutha maliknaina gooda
Vaani saavu raasukochina devuni kaada

Chal udukuthundhi saraa battilo maa kanta thade
| Jumbalikay aaya aaya sher |

Iga raaluthadhi bottu bottulo nee panche thade
| Jumbalikay aaya aaya sher |

Jadaluro jadaluro hadaluro dhadaluro
Kodutharo thodaluro theestharo tholuro
Savaariki doruku biddaa
Sevaaley lesthayi biddaa

Pegul dheesi medala yesi
Aadutham biddaa, aadutham biddaa

SECOND PALLAVI

Hey bari batthalunonninraa
Bar baadhey ayinonraa
Nannu peekuthava | Jumbalikay aaya sher |

Hey moldhaaram lenoniraa
Nee kanaa mondonraa
Iga peekuthava | Jumbalikay aaya sher |

Pottu pottu aakalundhi | Aaya sher |
Mettu mettu ekkuthara | Aaya sher |
Peru pathaa leynonni raa | Aaya sher |
Choosko Paradise ku addresaitha | Aaya sher |

Pottu pottu aakalundhi
Mettu mettu ekkuthara
Peru pathaa leynonni raa
Choosko Paradise ku addresaitha

snippet.title: Countries Decide Who Wins $25,000
snippet.description:
I canтАЩt believe who they chose

This might be the coolest thing we've ever made! Go check out the new Feastables x Super Mario Galaxy Movie products at Kroger, 7Eleven, Five Below, and Walmart locations nationwide ЁЯЪА https://fstbls.com/5mj6dv

We invited a bunch of countries and nations across the world to decide who should win $25,000 based off those that typically compete in the Olympics. However, we did accidentally label SpeedSilver as United Kingdom when we meant to have him as England, sorry SpeedSilver!

We did our best recreating the world map in Minecraft as close as possible to real life, but due to size restrictions in game so it didn't take an hour to cross the map it may not be entirely 1:1 so there may be some unintentional inconsistencies in the terrain and generation of the in game world map

snippet.description:
Today, I had to build stairs to try and get the rarest brainrot. Make sure you watch the whole video to find out what happens.

Insta: https://www.instagram.com/foltynn/

Twitter: https://twitter.com/Foltynnn

What is Roblox? ROBLOX is an online virtual playground and workshop, where kids of all ages can safely interact, create, have fun, and learn. ItтАЩs unique in that practically everything on ROBLOX is designed and constructed by members of the community. ROBLOX is designed for 13 to 18 year olds, but it is open to people of all ages. Each player starts by choosing an avatar and giving it an identity. They can then explore ROBLOX тАФ interacting with others by chatting, playing games, or collaborating on creative projects. Each player is also given their own piece of undeveloped real estate along with a virtual toolbox with which to design and build anything тАФ be it a navigable skyscraper, a working helicopter, a giant pinball machine, a multiplayer тАЬCapture the FlagтАЭ game or some other, yet-to-be-dreamed-up creation. There is no cost for this first plot of virtual land. By participating and by building cool stuff, ROBLOX members can earn specialty badges as well as ROBLOX dollars (тАЬRobuxтАЭ). In turn, they can shop the online catalog to purchase avatar clothing and accessories as well as premium building materials, interactive components, and working mechanisms.

id.title: ROBLOX MEMBANGUN TANGGA UNTUK BRAINROTS..
id.description:
Hari ini, aku harus membangun tangga untuk mencoba mendapatkan brainrot terlangka. Pastikan kalian menonton seluruh video untuk mengetahui apa yang terjadi.

MERCH FOLTYN: https://foltyn.shop/

Nama Roblox: TheRealFoltyn

Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/foltynn/

Twitter: https://twitter.com/Foltynnn

Apa itu Roblox? ROBLOX adalah taman bermain dan bengkel virtual online, tempat anak-anak dari segala usia dapat berinteraksi, berkreasi, bersenang-senang, dan belajar dengan aman. Keunikannya terletak pada hampir semua hal di ROBLOX dirancang dan dibangun oleh anggota komunitas. ROBLOX dirancang untuk usia 13 hingga 18 tahun, tetapi terbuka untuk semua usia. Setiap pemain memulai dengan memilih avatar dan memberinya identitas. Mereka kemudian dapat menjelajahi ROBLOX тАФ berinteraksi dengan orang lain melalui obrolan, bermain game, atau berkolaborasi dalam proyek kreatif. Setiap pemain juga diberikan sebidang lahan virtual yang belum dikembangkan beserta kotak peralatan virtual untuk mendesain dan membangun apa pun тАФ baik itu gedung pencakar langit yang dapat dijelajahi, helikopter yang berfungsi, mesin pinball raksasa, game "Capture the Flag" multipemain, atau kreasi lain yang belum terbayangkan. Tidak ada biaya untuk lahan virtual pertama ini. Dengan berpartisipasi dan membangun hal-hal keren, anggota ROBLOX dapat memperoleh lencana khusus serta mata uang ROBLOX ("Robux"). Sebagai gantinya, mereka dapat berbelanja di katalog online untuk membeli pakaian dan aksesori avatar serta bahan bangunan premium, komponen interaktif, dan mekanisme yang berfungsi.

ф╗КхЫЮуБпуАБуГЙуВдуГДх▒ИцМЗуБох╝╖ш▒к2уГБуГ╝уГауВТч╖ицИРуБЧуАБуБйуБбуВЙуБМуВИуВКх╝╖хКЫуБкуГБуГ╝уГауВТф╜ЬуВКф╕КуБТуВЛуБЛуВТчл╢уБЖуВ╣уВпуГпуГГуГЙуГУуГлуГАуГ╝уГРуГИуГлуБлцМСцИжуБЧуБ╛уБЩуАВф╝ЭшкмуБоICONщБ╕цЙЛуБЛуВЙчП╛ф╗гуБоуВ╣уГ╝уГСуГ╝уВ╣уВ┐уГ╝уБ╛уБзуАБуГРуВдуВиуГлуГ│уГ╗уГЯуГеуГ│уГШуГ│уБиуГЬуГлуВ╖уВвуГ╗уГЙуГлуГИуГауГ│уГИуБМц┐АчкБя╝Б

уВИуВКщлШуБДOVRя╝Ич╖ПхРИшйХф╛бя╝ЙуБоуГБуГ╝уГауВТф╜ЬуВКф╕КуБТуВЛуБоуБпуБйуБбуВЙуБоуГБуГ╝уГая╝Я

цФ╗цТГщЩгуБиф╕нчЫдуБох╝╖уБХуБпуБйуБбуВЙуБоуГБуГ╝уГая╝Я

уБЭуБЧуБжуАБхоЯщЪЫуБлшйжхРИуБзхЛЭхИйуВТхПОуВБуВЛуБоуБпуБйуБбуВЙуБоуГБуГ╝уГая╝Я

уБУуБоуАМуГЗуВвуГ╗уВпуГйуВ╖уВлуГ╝уАНуВ╣уВпуГпуГГуГЙуГУуГлуГАуГ╝уГБуГгуГмуГ│уВ╕уБпуАБф║ИцГ│хдЦуБощБ╕цЙЛщБ╕цКЮуВДщйЪуБНуБох▒ХщЦЛуБзуАБчЩ╜чЖ▒уБЧуБЯцИжуБДуБиуБкуВКуБ╛уБЧуБЯуАВ

it.description:

snippet.title: PUBGM 141 ULTIMATE GRIND - FT. #4T #HORAA #ASI8 #SCYTES #LF
snippet.description:
Welcome to the PUBGM 141 Ultimate Grind, one of the most exciting PUBG MOBILE competitive tournaments in South Asia.

Pro teams from Pakistan, Bangladesh, Nepal, and Sri Lanka are entering the battleground to compete in an intense multi day competition filled with strategy, rotations, and high pressure fights.

Over four days of action, squads will battle through multiple matches where every elimination, every rotation, and every decision can change the leaderboard.

Expect clutch moments, aggressive pushes, and high level PUBG MOBILE gameplay as teams fight to prove themselves on the battlefield.

Only one team will rise above the rest and become the Ultimate Grind Champion.

The grind begins now.

ЁЯПЖ PARTICIPATING TEAMS

ЁЯЗ╡ЁЯЗ░ 4THRIVES
ЁЯЗ╡ЁЯЗ░ ASI8 Esports
ЁЯЗ╡ЁЯЗ░ Loyalty First
ЁЯЗ╡ЁЯЗ░ Red Death
ЁЯЗ╡ЁЯЗ░ Phoenix Rise
ЁЯЗ╡ЁЯЗ░ Aminz Esports
ЁЯЗ╡ЁЯЗ░ TEAM SCYTES
ЁЯЗ╡ЁЯЗ░ Maxebels
ЁЯЗ╡ЁЯЗ░ KOXAV Esports
ЁЯЗ╡ЁЯЗ░ 313 Esports

ЁЯЗ│ЁЯЗ╡ Horaa Esports
ЁЯЗ│ЁЯЗ╡ NEPX Esports

ЁЯЗзЁЯЗй INIMICAL MONK
ЁЯЗзЁЯЗй CMF Esports
ЁЯЗзЁЯЗй KOD Esports
ЁЯЗзЁЯЗй CBI Esports

ЁЯЗ▒ЁЯЗ░ LF EQZ
ЁЯЗ▒ЁЯЗ░ NA VE ISSLxNRC

тП░ MATCH START TIME

ЁЯЗ╡ЁЯЗ░ Pakistan: 9:30 PM
ЁЯЗ▒ЁЯЗ░ Sri Lanka 10:00 PM 
ЁЯЗ│ЁЯЗ╡ Nepal 10:15 PM 
ЁЯЗзЁЯЗй Bangladesh 10:30 PM

ЁЯУЕ TOURNAMENT SCHEDULE
ЁЯУЖ March 11  to March 14, 2026

18 Teams
5 Matches Per Day
20 Total Matches

The team with the best overall performance across all matches will be crowned the PUBGM 141 Ultimate Grind Champion.

Comment your predictions Who will win the tournament?

Enjoy top-tier PUBG MOBILE esports action
